calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc. is present. Represented by Roger Patel.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jerry Rodriguez is present.
Attorney Elizabeth Strode appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JUL-01-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Off Calendar
